meta.title: Air Force Basic Training | Week 0
meta.description:
Week 0 begins the transition from civilian into an Airman. Zero Week is also known as Shock and Awe. This week,  all administration work  is completed, everyone's hair is standardised and recruits receive their ABU's. 
Physical Training evaluations or PT's also take place this week. Get training advice from former Drill Instructors and recruits delivered to your Sandboxx app every week.

Are you or a loved one about to become the future of the Air Force?
Stay connected at every step of the Air Force journey as well as getting that training advice every week with the Sandboxx app: https://link.sandboxx.us/youtube
.
